Between "periods" when students change classes, I hear they will often ask their teacher (with Admin privileges) to "drop me in my next class" aka, move the user into the voice chat of their next classroom... sounds like the future to me

One of my favorite things is that each teacher has a "homeroom" channel where students gather in the mornings - the teachers were surprised that the kids were showing up early, before the assigned time, to chat with each other and check in - I think that's amazing

My mom runs an incredible school and the way they have been using Discord to manage their remote students is working incredibly well- do I know anyone who knows anyone at @discord who I could connect her with for some guidance and feedback?
